370\\t    sessionId: r.session_id as string,\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8209:Description: Phase 002 defines the namespace as `spec_folder + loop_type + session_id`, but the read-side MCP surface does not enforce that boundary. `deep_loop_graph_query` accepts `sessionId` as optional and explicitly falls back to `all_sessions_default`; `deep_loop_graph_status` and `deep_loop_graph_convergence` do worse, because their published schemas do not expose `sessionId` at all, so callers can only read aggregated cross-session state. That lets one session observe another session’s graph shape and can also contaminate convergence decisions with unrelated session data.\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8210:Evidence: The schema for `query` makes `sessionId` optional, while `status` and `convergence` omit it entirely; the handlers then emit `scopeMode: 'all_sessions_default'` and notes describing cross-session fallback when no session is present.\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8211:Recommendation: Make `sessionId` required for all non-admin read tools. If aggregate/bootstrap/debug behavior is still needed, expose it through a separate explicitly named debug/admin surface so normal callers cannot bypass session isolation accidentally or maliciously.\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8246:1. Trace the reducer and any other runtime callers to confirm whether they always pass `sessionId`, or whether the cross-session read paths are exercised in normal operation.\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8262:Description: Phase 002 defines the namespace as `spec_folder + loop_type + session_id`, but the read-side MCP surface does not enforce that boundary. `deep_loop_graph_query` accepts `sessionId` as optional and explicitly falls back to `all_sessions_default`; `deep_loop_graph_status` and `deep_loop_graph_convergence` do worse, because their published schemas do not expose `sessionId` at all, so callers can only read aggregated cross-session state. That lets one session observe another session’s graph shape and can also contaminate convergence decisions with unrelated session data.\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8263:Evidence: The schema for `query` makes `sessionId` optional, while `status` and `convergence` omit it entirely; the handlers then emit `scopeMode: 'all_sessions_default'` and notes describing cross-session fallback when no session is present.\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8264:Recommendation: Make `sessionId` required for all non-admin read tools. If aggregate/bootstrap/debug behavior is still needed, expose it through a separate explicitly named debug/admin surface so normal callers cannot bypass session isolation accidentally or maliciously.\\n.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-002.md:8299:1. .opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9146:.opencode/changelog/15--sk-improve-agent/v1.2.0.0.md:27:  - `improvement-journal.jsonl` → extracts `lastSessionStart`, `lastSessionEnd`, `totalEvents`, `eventTypeCounts`, and terminal `stopReason` + `sessionOutcome` from the latest session_end event.

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9203:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:24:lse = [e for e in events if e['eventType'] == 'legal_stop_evaluated']
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9204:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:25:blocked = [e for e in events if e['eventType'] == 'blocked_stop']
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9205:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:28:    gates = lse[-1].get('details', {}).get('gateResults', {})
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9206:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:30:    print(f'legal_stop_evaluated found — gates present: {present}')
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9207:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:32:    failed = blocked[-1].get('details', {}).get('failedGates', [])
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9208:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:33:    print(f'blocked_stop found — failed gates: {failed}')
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9209:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:36:    ends = [e for e in events if e['eventType'] in ('session_ended', 'session_end')]
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9210:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:40:        print('INFO — no blocked_stop event found; may need scenario with intentional gate failure')
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9211:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:46:- `legal_stop_evaluated` event emitted with `gateResults` containing all 5 gate bundles:
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9212:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:52:- When any gate fails: `blocked_stop` event emitted with `failedGates[]` and `reason`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9213:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:59:When convergence math would trigger stop but at least one gate bundle fails, the journal contains a `blocked_stop` event with the failing gate names, and the session's `stopReason` is `blockedStop` -- the session does NOT claim `converged`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9214:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:63:- If `legal_stop_evaluated` is missing: verify the orchestrator calls the legal-stop evaluation after convergence math triggers
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9215:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:64:- If `blocked_stop` is missing when a gate fails: check the conditional that routes to `blocked_stop` vs `converged` based on gate results
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9216:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/028-legal-stop-gates.md:75:[paste legal_stop_evaluated and/or blocked_stop event JSON]
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9217:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/025-stop-reason-taxonomy.md:9:Validates that every completed improvement session emits a `session_ended` event with a valid `stopReason` and `sessionOutcome` drawn from the frozen taxonomies defined in `improvement-journal.cjs`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9218:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/025-stop-reason-taxonomy.md:23:ends = [e for e in events if e['eventType'] in ('session_ended', 'session_end')]

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9220:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/025-stop-reason-taxonomy.md:38:- Journal contains at least one `session_ended` or `session_end` event
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9221:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/025-stop-reason-taxonomy.md:42:- `emitEvent()` refuses to write a `session_ended` event with an invalid stopReason or sessionOutcome
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9222:.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/07--runtime-truth/025-stop-reason-taxonomy.md:46:After a completed improvement session, the journal contains a `session_ended` event whose `stopReason` and `sessionOutcome` are both valid members of the frozen taxonomy enums, and the `validateEvent()` function rejects any event with invalid values.

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9438:Title: `sk-improve-agent` never emits the first-class legal-stop events that the other reducers depend on
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9439:Description: The improve-agent runtime truth contract says legal-stop evaluation must produce `legal_stop_evaluated` and, on failure, `blocked_stop` with failed gates. The visible auto workflow only emits `gate_evaluation` and `session_end`; the confirm workflow mirrors the same omission at `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_improve-agent_confirm.yaml:198-217`. That leaves `sk-improve-agent` as the outlier versus research/review, where reducer-visible stop-gate events are first-class state. Because those events never exist, the improver reducer cannot replay gate failures, blocked-stop reasons, or blocked-stop history the way the other two reducers can.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9440:Evidence: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_charter.md:84-85,104` requires `legal_stop_evaluated` plus `blocked_stop` with full gate results, but the shipped workflow only emits `gate_evaluation` at `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_improve-agent_auto.yaml:168-170` and then jumps to `session_end` at `182-183`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9443:2. `F-017-002` | Severity: `P1` | Dimension: `correctness` | File: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs` | Line: `835-844, 761-813`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9446:Evidence: The reducer stores the fields at `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:837-839`, but `renderDashboard()` only outputs Global Summary, Sample Quality, Guardrails, Stop Status, per-profile sections, and Recommendation at `761-813`. In the low-sample fixture, the reducer produces non-null `journalSummary`, `candidateLineage`, and `mutationCoverage`, while the rendered dashboard only contains `## Sample Quality`. This also contradicts `.opencode/changelog/15--sk-improve-agent/v1.2.0.0.md:85`, which says the dashboard exposes the “full journal/lineage/coverage summary.”
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9483:Title: `sk-improve-agent` never emits the first-class legal-stop events that the other reducers depend on
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9484:Description: The improve-agent runtime truth contract says legal-stop evaluation must produce `legal_stop_evaluated` and, on failure, `blocked_stop` with failed gates. The visible auto workflow only emits `gate_evaluation` and `session_end`; the confirm workflow mirrors the same omission at `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_improve-agent_confirm.yaml:198-217`. That leaves `sk-improve-agent` as the outlier versus research/review, where reducer-visible stop-gate events are first-class state. Because those events never exist, the improver reducer cannot replay gate failures, blocked-stop reasons, or blocked-stop history the way the other two reducers can.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9485:Evidence: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_charter.md:84-85,104` requires `legal_stop_evaluated` plus `blocked_stop` with full gate results, but the shipped workflow only emits `gate_evaluation` at `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_improve-agent_auto.yaml:168-170` and then jumps to `session_end` at `182-183`.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9488:2. `F-017-002` | Severity: `P1` | Dimension: `correctness` | File: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs` | Line: `835-844, 761-813`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-017.md:9491:Evidence: The reducer stores the fields at `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:837-839`, but `renderDashboard()` only outputs Global Summary, Sample Quality, Guardrails, Stop Status, per-profile sections, and Recommendation at `761-813`. In the low-sample fixture, the reducer produces non-null `journalSummary`, `candidateLineage`, and `mutationCoverage`, while the rendered dashboard only contains `## Sample Quality`. This also contradicts `.opencode/changelog/15--sk-improve-agent/v1.2.0.0.md:85`, which says the dashboard exposes the “full journal/lineage/coverage summary.”
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:32:This bundle delivered runtime truth, semantic coverage graph, wave execution, and offline optimization across ~200 files and +19K lines for sk-deep-research, sk-deep-review, and sk-improve-agent.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1118:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:8:- The shipped reducer is not that missing reconstruction layer. `reduce-state.cjs` builds its registry solely from `agent-improvement-state.jsonl`, then derives stop status from recommendation tallies, benchmark fail counts, plateau detection, and mirror-drift text; its `main()` reads only the state log, config, and optional drift report before writing the dashboard and registry. That leaves journal-only events such as `blocked_stop`, `trade_off_detected`, or `benchmark_completed` details outside reducer-owned recovery surfaces (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1119:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:9:- Candidate lineage is persisted but not rebuilt or consumed by any shipped recovery/reporting path I inspected. `candidate-lineage.cjs` is a standalone JSON helper that records nodes and can answer lineage queries, but the reducer never reads `candidate-lineage.json`, and the runtime-truth playbook frames lineage creation as something the orchestrator must invoke after each evaluation rather than something a downstream consumer can reconstruct from existing state (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/candidate-lineage.cjs:47-109`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/06--end-to-end-loop/024-candidate-lineage.md:28-34`).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1120:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:10:- Trade-off decisions are documented as reducer-visible, but the shipped consumer path does not ingest them. The strategy asset says the reducer populates the trade-off table when `trade-off-detector.cjs` flags a Pareto trade-off, and the playbook expects dashboard trade-off annotations, yet the actual reducer renders only dimensional score tables, failure modes, benchmark counts, and generic stop recommendations. The detector itself can only reconstruct trajectory from `candidate_scored` journal events, not from the reducer’s state log (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:123-136`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/06--end-to-end-loop/023-trade-off-detection.md:20-28`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/trade-off-detector.cjs:130-172`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-475`).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1121:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:11:- Benchmark-stability gating is similarly under-consumed on the recovery side. The module can compute per-dimension `stabilityWarning` messages only when a caller supplies replay result arrays, and the changelog says this should gate promotion on measurement reliability, but the reducer only counts benchmark pass/fail records from the state log and never reads stability coefficients or warning payloads. As shipped, post-run recovery can say “weak benchmark runs” while still losing the evidence needed to distinguish unstable measurement from ordinary benchmark failure (`.opencode/changelog/15--sk-improve-agent/v1.1.0.0.md:27-35`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/benchmark-stability.cjs:95-171`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:286-289`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:431-437`).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1122:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:15:- This is not merely reducer documentation drift. The reducer’s own file inputs and registry builder omit the journal, lineage graph, and mutation-coverage artifacts entirely, so the current recovery gap is structural, not just under-explained (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1123:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:28:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1124:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:29:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1125:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-012.md:30:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-503`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1134:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-013.md:12:- `sk-improve-agent` has no mixed-ownership anchor write path in the shipped reducer. The runtime layout includes a mutable `agent-improvement-strategy.md`, but the reducer only regenerates `experiment-registry.json` and `agent-improvement-dashboard.md`, and the skill explicitly frames `reduce-state.cjs` as the dashboard/registry refresh step after ledger appends (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/references/quick_reference.md:74-85`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:203-204`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:374-382`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`).
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1139:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-013.md:33:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1143:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-017.md:10:- Reducer stop-gating collapses every non-`benchmark-pass` benchmark record into `benchmarkFailCount` and `weakBenchmarkRuns`, then stops after the configured maximum of 2 weak runs, but it never reads replay counts, per-dimension coefficients, or `stabilityWarning` payloads. In practice the operator-facing stop reason cannot distinguish “unstable because sample size is too small” from “genuine benchmark regression.” (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_config.json:72-79`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_config_reference.md:57-60`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1144:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-017.md:11:- The published dashboard contract promises reducer-populated trade-off visibility, but the shipped renderer does not surface it. `improvement_strategy.md` reserves a reducer-owned “Trade-Off Detection” table, yet `reduce-state.cjs` only renders counts, repeated failure modes, dimensional progress, and a generic benchmark-failure recommendation, so neither real Pareto trade-offs nor insufficient-sample instability are clearly labeled in the visible dashboard path. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:123-136`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1145:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-017.md:26:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1146:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-017.md:27:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1147:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-017.md:28:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1158:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:4:This iteration audited contract self-compliance for `sk-improve-agent` by comparing the published operator-facing promises in the README, SKILL, changelog, and `assets/improvement_strategy.md` against the visible reducer/dashboard path in `scripts/reduce-state.cjs`. The goal was to verify which promised artifacts actually survive end-to-end and where trade-off labeling, benchmark stability wording, and stop-reason/session-outcome language drift.
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1159:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:7:- `assets/improvement_strategy.md` presents reducer-owned machine sections for `What Improved`, `What Failed`, `Best Known State`, `Next Recommendation`, `Packaging Follow-Up`, `Mutation Coverage`, `Convergence Eligibility`, and `Trade-Off Detection`, but the visible reducer never opens or writes that file. `reduce-state.cjs` only emits `experiment-registry.json` and `agent-improvement-dashboard.md`, so most of the promised strategy-surface artifacts cannot survive the shipped reducer path. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:71-137`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1160:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:8:- The dimensional-progress contract does survive. README says the reducer renders a Dimensional Progress table and stops when dimensions plateau, and the reducer both renders that table and adds an `all dimensions plateaued` stop reason when the plateau window condition is met. This is the clearest operator-visible contract that remains self-compliant in the visible path. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/README.md:163-169`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:305-325`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-391`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1161:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:9:- Trade-off annotations do not survive the visible dashboard path. `improvement_strategy.md` reserves a `Trade-Off Detection` table plus hard/soft resolution guidance, but `renderProfileSection()` only outputs repeated failure modes plus dimensional progress and `renderDashboard()` adds only summary, guardrails, stop status, and recommendation. No trade-off table or action annotation is rendered in the shipped dashboard output. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:125-136`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:394-475`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1162:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:10:- Benchmark stability wording is lost between the published contract and the reducer surface. README says promotion depends on benchmark status and repeatability evidence, and SKILL says `benchmark-stability.cjs` emits a weight-recommendation report only after a minimum session-count threshold, but the dashboard only shows benchmark run/pass/fail counts, best benchmark score, and a generic benchmark-failure recommendation. There is no replay-count, stability-coefficient, repeatability, or `insufficient data` label in the visible reducer output. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/README.md:159-165`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:318-323`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:404-438`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:444-475`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1163:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:11:- Stop-reason and session-outcome wording drift before reaching the operator-facing dashboard. The changelog says sessions should report exact `STOP_REASONS` and `SESSION_OUTCOMES`, and SKILL publishes the outcome labels plus `blockedStop` gate-bundle language, but the reducer collapses stop status to booleans and free-text reasons while only counting `Keep-baseline results` in the global summary. The visible dashboard never renders enum-style stop reasons or session outcomes such as `promoted`, `rolledBack`, or `advisoryOnly`. (`.opencode/changelog/15--sk-improve-agent/v1.1.0.0.md:15-18`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:261-289`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:440-468`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1164:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:14:- This is not universal contract drift. README's `mirror drift as packaging work` guidance survives in the dashboard guardrails, and the dimensional-progress/plateau path is also visibly implemented. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/README.md:167-169`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:458-463`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1165:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-018.md:25:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-503`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1268:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:10:- `reduce-state.cjs` is not the first place where the rich stop/outcome contract disappears, because it never opens `improvement-journal.jsonl` at all. Its main path reads only `agent-improvement-state.jsonl`, config, and mirror-drift report, then writes `experiment-registry.json` and `agent-improvement-dashboard.md`; any exact stop/session journal events would remain out-of-band from the reducer-owned operator surfaces. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1269:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:12:- The visible stop/synthesis path collapses termination to reducer-generated stop-status booleans and free-text reasons rather than exact journal enums. Auto mode stops when `experiment-registry.json` reports `stopStatus.shouldStop`, confirm mode presents dashboard-driven approval choices, and the reducer renders only `Should stop`, `Drift ambiguity`, and concatenated reasons; there is no operator-facing consumption of `sessionOutcome` or enum-valued `stopReason` on the shipped path. (`.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_auto.yaml:152-167`, `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_confirm.yaml:176-201`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-475`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1270:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:15:- This is not a reducer-only discard bug. The visible YAML workflow never emits journal events into the reducer input path in the first place, so the contract break begins upstream of `reduce-state.cjs`. (`.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_auto.yaml:149-167`, `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_confirm.yaml:173-201`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1271:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:28:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1272:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/iterations/iteration-019.md:29:- `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-503`

.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1696:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/deep-research-dashboard.md:154:- This is not merely reducer documentation drift. The reducer’s own file inputs and registry builder omit the journal, lineage graph, and mutation-coverage artifacts entirely, so the current recovery gap is structural, not just under-explained (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`). (iteration 12)
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1697:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/deep-research-dashboard.md:169:- This is not universal contract drift. README's `mirror drift as packaging work` guidance survives in the dashboard guardrails, and the dimensional-progress/plateau path is also visibly implemented. .opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1698:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/deep-research-dashboard.md:171:- This is not a reducer-only discard bug. .opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1762:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-009.md:6149:Evidence: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/mutation-coverage.cjs:60-67`, `86-92`, `127-135`, `198-204`; `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:270-275`.  
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1764:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-009.md:6201:File: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs`  
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1765:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-009.md:6205:Evidence: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/candidate-lineage.cjs:59-63` writes `candidateId` / `parentCandidateId`; `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:228-260` reads `id` / `parentId`.  
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1766:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-009.md:6211:File: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs`  
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1767:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-009.md:6215:Evidence: `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/mutation-coverage.cjs:60-67`, `86-92`, `127-135`, `198-204`; `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:270-275`.  
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1960:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1217:      "text": "Benchmark-stability gating is similarly under-consumed on the recovery side. The module can compute per-dimension `stabilityWarning` messages only when a caller supplies replay result arrays, and the changelog says this should gate promotion on measurement reliability, but the reducer only counts benchmark pass/fail records from the state log and never reads stability coefficients or warning payloads. As shipped, post-run recovery can say “weak benchmark runs” while still losing the evidence needed to distinguish unstable measurement from ordinary benchmark failure (`.opencode/changelog/15--sk-improve-agent/v1.1.0.0.md:27-35`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/benchmark-stability.cjs:95-171`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:286-289`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:431-437`).",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1961:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1226:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1962:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1227:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1963:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1228:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1964:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1240:      "text": "Candidate lineage is persisted but not rebuilt or consumed by any shipped recovery/reporting path I inspected. `candidate-lineage.cjs` is a standalone JSON helper that records nodes and can answer lineage queries, but the reducer never reads `candidate-lineage.json`, and the runtime-truth playbook frames lineage creation as something the orchestrator must invoke after each evaluation rather than something a downstream consumer can reconstruct from existing state (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/candidate-lineage.cjs:47-109`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/06--end-to-end-loop/024-candidate-lineage.md:28-34`).",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1965:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1249:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1966:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1250:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1967:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1251:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1968:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1272:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1969:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1273:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1970:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1274:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1971:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1286:      "text": "The shipped reducer is not that missing reconstruction layer. `reduce-state.cjs` builds its registry solely from `agent-improvement-state.jsonl`, then derives stop status from recommendation tallies, benchmark fail counts, plateau detection, and mirror-drift text; its `main()` reads only the state log, config, and optional drift report before writing the dashboard and registry. That leaves journal-only events such as `blocked_stop`, `trade_off_detected`, or `benchmark_completed` details outside reducer-owned recovery surfaces (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`).",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1972:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1295:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1973:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1296:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1974:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1297:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1975:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1309:      "text": "Trade-off decisions are documented as reducer-visible, but the shipped consumer path does not ingest them. The strategy asset says the reducer populates the trade-off table when `trade-off-detector.cjs` flags a Pareto trade-off, and the playbook expects dashboard trade-off annotations, yet the actual reducer renders only dimensional score tables, failure modes, benchmark counts, and generic stop recommendations. The detector itself can only reconstruct trajectory from `candidate_scored` journal events, not from the reducer’s state log (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:123-136`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/manual_testing_playbook/06--end-to-end-loop/023-trade-off-detection.md:20-28`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/trade-off-detector.cjs:130-172`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-475`).",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1976:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1318:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1977:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1319:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1978:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1320:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1984:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1346:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1990:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1365:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:1996:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1384:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2002:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1403:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2003:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1408:      "text": "`sk-improve-agent` has no mixed-ownership anchor write path in the shipped reducer. The runtime layout includes a mutable `agent-improvement-strategy.md`, but the reducer only regenerates `experiment-registry.json` and `agent-improvement-dashboard.md`, and the skill explicitly frames `reduce-state.cjs` as the dashboard/registry refresh step after ledger appends (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/references/quick_reference.md:74-85`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:203-204`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:374-382`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`).",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2008:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1422:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2014:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1441:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:482-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2074:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1779:      "text": "The published `sk-improve-agent` contract and visible auto workflow keep that mutation coverage graph local to the improvement runtime rather than bridging it into the shared coverage-graph MCP. The skill describes `scripts/mutation-coverage.cjs` as the reader/writer for the coverage graph and says it uses `loop_type: \"improvement\"` isolation, while the auto workflow only appends the state ledger and runs `scripts/reduce-state.cjs`; I found no visible `deep_loop_graph_upsert` step on this path (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:298-300`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:389-390`, `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_auto.yaml:149-155`).",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2075:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1853:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2076:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1854:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2077:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1855:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2078:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1875:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2079:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1876:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2080:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1877:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2081:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1889:      "text": "Reducer stop-gating collapses every non-`benchmark-pass` benchmark record into `benchmarkFailCount` and `weakBenchmarkRuns`, then stops after the configured maximum of 2 weak runs, but it never reads replay counts, per-dimension coefficients, or `stabilityWarning` payloads. In practice the operator-facing stop reason cannot distinguish “unstable because sample size is too small” from “genuine benchmark regression.” (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_config.json:72-79`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_config_reference.md:57-60`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2082:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1897:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2083:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1898:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2084:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1899:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2085:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1911:      "text": "The published dashboard contract promises reducer-populated trade-off visibility, but the shipped renderer does not surface it. `improvement_strategy.md` reserves a reducer-owned “Trade-Off Detection” table, yet `reduce-state.cjs` only renders counts, repeated failure modes, dimensional progress, and a generic benchmark-failure recommendation, so neither real Pareto trade-offs nor insufficient-sample instability are clearly labeled in the visible dashboard path. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:123-136`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2086:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1919:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2087:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1920:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2088:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1921:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2089:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1941:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:173-186`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2090:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1942:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-289`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2091:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1943:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-438`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2092:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1955:      "text": "`assets/improvement_strategy.md` presents reducer-owned machine sections for `What Improved`, `What Failed`, `Best Known State`, `Next Recommendation`, `Packaging Follow-Up`, `Mutation Coverage`, `Convergence Eligibility`, and `Trade-Off Detection`, but the visible reducer never opens or writes that file. `reduce-state.cjs` only emits `experiment-registry.json` and `agent-improvement-dashboard.md`, so most of the promised strategy-surface artifacts cannot survive the shipped reducer path. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:71-137`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2093:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1963:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2094:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1969:      "text": "Benchmark stability wording is lost between the published contract and the reducer surface. README says promotion depends on benchmark status and repeatability evidence, and SKILL says `benchmark-stability.cjs` emits a weight-recommendation report only after a minimum session-count threshold, but the dashboard only shows benchmark run/pass/fail counts, best benchmark score, and a generic benchmark-failure recommendation. There is no replay-count, stability-coefficient, repeatability, or `insufficient data` label in the visible reducer output. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/README.md:159-165`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:318-323`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:404-438`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:444-475`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2095:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1977:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2096:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1983:      "text": "Stop-reason and session-outcome wording drift before reaching the operator-facing dashboard. The changelog says sessions should report exact `STOP_REASONS` and `SESSION_OUTCOMES`, and SKILL publishes the outcome labels plus `blockedStop` gate-bundle language, but the reducer collapses stop status to booleans and free-text reasons while only counting `Keep-baseline results` in the global summary. The visible dashboard never renders enum-style stop reasons or session outcomes such as `promoted`, `rolledBack`, or `advisoryOnly`. (`.opencode/changelog/15--sk-improve-agent/v1.1.0.0.md:15-18`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/SKILL.md:261-289`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:440-468`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2097:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1991:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2098:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:1997:      "text": "The dimensional-progress contract does survive. README says the reducer renders a Dimensional Progress table and stops when dimensions plateau, and the reducer both renders that table and adds an `all dimensions plateaued` stop reason when the plateau window condition is met. This is the clearest operator-visible contract that remains self-compliant in the visible path. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/README.md:163-169`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:305-325`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:371-391`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2099:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2005:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2100:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2011:      "text": "Trade-off annotations do not survive the visible dashboard path. `improvement_strategy.md` reserves a `Trade-Off Detection` table plus hard/soft resolution guidance, but `renderProfileSection()` only outputs repeated failure modes plus dimensional progress and `renderDashboard()` adds only summary, guardrails, stop status, and recommendation. No trade-off table or action annotation is rendered in the shipped dashboard output. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:125-136`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:394-475`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2101:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2019:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-503`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2103:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2035:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2104:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2036:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2105:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2041:      "text": "`reduce-state.cjs` is not the first place where the rich stop/outcome contract disappears, because it never opens `improvement-journal.jsonl` at all. Its main path reads only `agent-improvement-state.jsonl`, config, and mirror-drift report, then writes `experiment-registry.json` and `agent-improvement-dashboard.md`; any exact stop/session journal events would remain out-of-band from the reducer-owned operator surfaces. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2106:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2051:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2107:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2052:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2108:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2067:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2109:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2068:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2110:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2083:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2111:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2084:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2112:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2099:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2113:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2100:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2114:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2105:      "text": "The visible stop/synthesis path collapses termination to reducer-generated stop-status booleans and free-text reasons rather than exact journal enums. Auto mode stops when `experiment-registry.json` reports `stopStatus.shouldStop`, confirm mode presents dashboard-driven approval choices, and the reducer renders only `Should stop`, `Drift ambiguity`, and concatenated reasons; there is no operator-facing consumption of `sessionOutcome` or enum-valued `stopReason` on the shipped path. (`.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_auto.yaml:152-167`, `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_confirm.yaml:176-201`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-475`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2115:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2115:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:42-54`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2116:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2116:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:425-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2117:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2134:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2118:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2135:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2119:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2140:      "text": "I found no visible contradiction-oriented graph gate in the operator path. The published improve-agent workflow enumerates scan, propose, score, benchmark, append, reduce, and stop steps, and the reducer’s stop evaluator uses no contradiction input or graph query surface, so contradiction handling remains absent from the visible coverage-graph loop rather than participating in stop blocking. (`.opencode/command/improve/agent.md:272-286`, `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_auto.yaml:137-158`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-325`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2120:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2153:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2121:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2154:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2122:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2172:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2123:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2173:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2124:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2178:      "text": "The runtime config enables a coverage-graph file and the strategy template reserves reducer-populated `Mutation Coverage` and `Convergence Eligibility` sections, but `reduce-state.cjs` never opens `mutation-coverage.json`. Its main path reads only `agent-improvement-state.jsonl`, config, and mirror-drift report before writing `experiment-registry.json` and `agent-improvement-dashboard.md`, so graph data does not enter the operator-visible dashboard or recommendation surfaces. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_config.json:92-99`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:114-123`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2125:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2191:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2126:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2192:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2127:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2197:      "text": "Visible stop gating is reducer-driven rather than graph-driven. `checkConvergenceEligibility()` would reject convergence for insufficient or unstable trajectory data, and the strategy template expects a verdict derived from trajectory plus exhaustion, but the actual stop path uses only trailing ties, infra failures, weak benchmark runs, drift ambiguity, and dimension plateau from the JSONL ledger. Coverage-graph convergence eligibility never feeds `step_stop_check`. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/mutation-coverage.cjs:229-272`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/assets/improvement_strategy.md:116-123`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`, `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_auto.yaml:152-158`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2128:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2210:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:259-332`",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2129:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2211:        "`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`"
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2139:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2528:      "text": "This is not merely reducer documentation drift. The reducer’s own file inputs and registry builder omit the journal, lineage graph, and mutation-coverage artifacts entirely, so the current recovery gap is structural, not just under-explained (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:145-235`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`).",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2140:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2603:      "text": "This is not universal contract drift. README's `mirror drift as packaging work` guidance survives in the dashboard guardrails, and the dimensional-progress/plateau path is also visibly implemented. (`.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/README.md:167-169`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:458-463`)",
.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/review/iterations/iteration-016.md:2141:.opencode/specs/skilled-agent-orchestration/042-sk-deep-research-review-improvement-2/research/findings-registry.json:2613:      "text": "This is not a reducer-only discard bug. The visible YAML workflow never emits journal events into the reducer input path in the first place, so the contract break begins upstream of `reduce-state.cjs`. (`.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_auto.yaml:149-167`, `.opencode/command/improve/assets/improve_agent-improver_confirm.yaml:173-201`, `.opencode/skill/sk-improve-agent/scripts/reduce-state.cjs:489-503`)",
